caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a red bow tie. He wears large black headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him, a wall displays framed photographs and clothing on mannequins, including shirts branded with "LEE." Red and white logos appear on the screen, featuring the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a smiling expression and looks slightly to his right, subtly shifting his facial expression and head position as if engaged in a conversation. The background remains static, while the man's slight movements suggest a natural, candid moment during a recording session.
